name: 5stack-inventory-plugin
description: CS2 inventory simulator — a 5stack Custom Pages micro-frontend. Rendered natively inside the 5stack panel via Module Federation; reuses 5stack Steam auth.

scripts.dev: npm install && vite build && (DEV_WATCH=1 vite build &) && node scripts/serve.mjs
scripts.dev:api: cd backend && npm install && node --watch --experimental-strip-types src/server.ts
